mapper.select:
SELECT patient_id, patient_no, name, gender, birth_date, rrn, phone, email, address, address_detail, is_foreigner, note, status_code, is_vip, created_at, updated_at FROM patient WHERE status_code != 'INACTIVE'
AND TO_CHAR(patient_id) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND patient_no LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND phone LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND birth_date = #{keyword}
AND name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT patient_id, patient_no, name, gender, birth_date, rrn, phone, email, address, address_detail, is_foreigner, note, status_code, is_vip, created_at, updated_at FROM patient
status_code != 'INACTIVE'
AND name LIKE '%' || #{name} || '%'
AND phone LIKE '%' || #{phone} || '%'
AND TO_CHAR(birth_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = #{birthDate}
ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT patient_id, patient_no, name, gender, birth_date, rrn, phone, email, address, address_detail, is_foreigner, note, status_code, is_vip, created_at, updated_at FROM patient WHERE status_code != 'INACTIVE' AND LOWER(name) = LOWER(#{name}) AND TO_CHAR(birth_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = #{birthDate} AND REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', '') = #{phoneDigits} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT patient_id, patient_no, name, gender, birth_date, rrn, phone, email, address, address_detail, is_foreigner, note, status_code, is_vip, created_at, updated_at FROM patient WHERE status_code != 'INACTIVE' AND LOWER(name) = LOWER(#{name}) AND TO_CHAR(birth_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = #{birthDate} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT patient_id, patient_no, name, gender, birth_date, rrn, phone, email, address, address_detail, is_foreigner, note, status_code, is_vip, created_at, updated_at FROM patient WHERE status_code != 'INACTIVE' AND LOWER(name) = LOWER(#{name}) AND REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', '') = #{phoneDigits} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT patient_id, patient_no, name, gender, birth_date, rrn, phone, email, address, address_detail, is_foreigner, note, status_code, is_vip, created_at, updated_at FROM patient WHERE status_code != 'INACTIVE' AND TO_CHAR(birth_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = #{birthDate} AND REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', '') = #{phoneDigits} ORDER BY created_at DESC
